Human Resources Policies
1. Employment and Equal Opportunity. The company is committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants. Hiring, promotion, training, and compensation decisions shall be based on qualifications, performance, and business needs without discrimination. 2. Attendance and Workplace Conduct Employees are expected to maintain professionalism, punctuality, and respectful behavior in the workplace. Any form of harassment, discrimination, violence, or misconduct is strictly prohibited. 3. Compensation, Benefits, and Leave Employees shall receive compensation and benefits in accordance with company policies and applicable laws. Approved leave requests, including vacation and sick leave, must follow company procedures. 4. Confidentiality and Company Property Employees must protect confidential company information and use company property, equipment, and systems responsibly and for authorized business purposes only. 5. Performance, Discipline, and Termination Employee performance may be reviewed periodically. Violations of company policies may result in disciplinary action, including warnings, suspension, or termination depending on the severity of the offense. Acknowledgment.
